zh.lifeSummary: 當John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby於1328年出生在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比時，他的父親Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby26歲，母親Joane Roscelin24歲。他於1343年與Lady Cecily de Ufford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1356年登記服兵役。他去世於1372年3月29日在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby was born in 1328, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby, was 26 and his mother, Joane Roscelin, was 24. He married Lady Cecily de Ufford in 1343. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1356. He died on 29 March 1372, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby est né en 1328, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joane Roscelin, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Cecily de Ufford en 1343. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1356. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby 1328 in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby 26 und seine Mutter Joane Roscelin 24. Er hat 1343 Lady Cecily de Ufford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1356 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 29. März 1372 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby è nato il nel 1328 nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joane Roscelin, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Cecily de Ufford nel 1343. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1356. Morì il 29 marzo 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby(이)가 1328년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Roscelin(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1343년 Lady Cecily de Ufford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1356년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1372년 3월 29일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에 묻혔다.

pt.Eresby, Lincolnshire, England: Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby nasceu em 1328, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joane Roscelin, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Cecily de Ufford em 1343. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1356. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. James, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Englan: ст. джемесь, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Fought at the battle of Poitiers: поитиирс 7 кантон, поитиирс, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby родился в 1328 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Roscelin, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Cecily de Ufford в 1343 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1356 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 29 марта 1372 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Willoughby III Lord Willoughby nació en 1328, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joane Roscelin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Cecily de Ufford en 1343. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1356. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
